title: Descend on the Surface
overview: With the disappearance of guardian angels on Earth, the four Saint Beasts are called on to investigate who's behind the disappearances.

title: Ill-Tempered Angel
overview: Gou ends up in a haunted mansion, where he discovers one of the Wandering Angels is trying to convince two young girls to move on to the afterlife.

title: Unforgivable Desire
overview: While looking in her magical mirror the Goddess sees Hiro of the Hawk, who has a revelation of darkness.

title: Treachery of the Fallen Angels
overview: Goh and Ray are busy resealing the Land of Revival, while Gai and Maya get caught up in the disappearance of a guardian angel...

title: Guardian Angel's Trap!
overview: Maya and Kira try to find out the truth about Judas, and the Goddess visits the Four Saint Beasts to invite them to the Full Moon Festival.

title: For Whose Sake
overview: Maya, Kira, and Ayumi, and the other guardian angels, start to fall into hell, and the Four Saint Beasts find themselves falling along with them.
